Leslie Liu

I build applied AI products that connect machine learning, full-stack execution, and clear user-facing experiences. My background blends scientific modeling, process engineering, product thinking, and hands-on software delivery.

Selected Work

Projects with technical depth and clear product intent

A cleaner first look at the work that best represents my mix of machine learning, systems thinking, and applied experimentation.

Hackathon • Multi-agent AI

BigScore

A crypto reliability scoring platform that combines multi-source market, development, and security signals into an explainable 0-100 trust score.

Agentic workflow Scoring pipeline API-backed UI
Read More
Materials ML

Thermoplastic Elastomer Predictor

Forward and inverse ML models for polymer stress-strain prediction, paired with Bayesian optimization to guide performance-oriented material design.

Scientific ML Bayesian optimization Inverse design
Read More
Interactive Systems

Game AI and ML Experiments

Interactive AI experiments spanning path finding, reinforcement learning, and gameplay behaviors in visually demonstrable environments.

A* Dijkstra RL agents

About Snapshot

Bridging research, engineering, and product delivery

My background started in chemical engineering and evolved through semiconductor process engineering, AI research, and software-focused graduate study in computer science.

What I bring

I build systems that connect modeling, data pipelines, and user-facing delivery, so research ideas can become tools people can actually use.

Current focus

Machine learning engineering, applied AI product workflows, and interfaces that make model output easier to understand, trust, and act on.

Working style

Fast iteration, technical ownership, and a bias toward moving from experimentation to demos, prototypes, and working software with measurable value.

Skills

Tools and areas I use most

A compact overview of the areas that show up repeatedly across my work.

Python Machine Learning Data Science LLM Apps Data Analysis MLOps Mindset Product Prototyping Scientific Computing Automation Frontend Integration
